scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute vidaas --local --file src/migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute vidaas --local --file src/migrations/0002_add_error_column.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute vidaas --remote --file src/migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute vidaas --remote --file src/migrations/0002_add_error_column.sql
scripts.queues:create: wrangler queues create image-generation && wrangler queues create video-generation
scripts.r2:create: wrangler r2 bucket create vidaas-videos --jurisdiction eu
